drl:
rule "R0"
salience 5
no-loop
when
    T0(f0 not in (4, 5, -0.5))
    T0($b0_1_0 : f1)
    T1($b0_2_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -9
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T0(f0 not in (4, 5, -0.5))
    T0($b1_1_0 : f1)
    accumulate( T1(f1 != false, f1 == true, f0 != $b1_1_0); $a1_2 : count() )
then
end
rule "R2"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    exists(T2($g2_0 : f2) and T1(f1 != $g2_0))
then
end
rule "R3"
salience 4
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f0 != 2.5, $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f1, f2 == false)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    $p3_0.setF2(true);
    $p3_0.setF1(5);
    $p3_0.setF1(0);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
salience($b4_1_0)
when
    T1($b4_0_0 : f1, $b4_0_1 : f0)
    T0(f1 == 0, f1 < $b4_0_1, $b4_1_0 : f0)
    T2()
then
end
rule "R5"
salience 9
when
    $p5_0 : T0(f1 >= -3 && < -2, f2 == false)
    accumulate( T1(f1 in (false, false, true), f0 >= 6.0 && f0 <= 0.0, $s5_1 : f0); $a5_1 : sum($s5_1) )
then
    insert(new T2($p5_0.isF2(), $p5_0.getF0(), $p5_0.isF2()));
    insert(new T2(false, $p5_0.getF1(), $p5_0.isF2()));
    modify($p5_0) { setF2(true), setF1($p5_0.getF1()) }
end
